allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output '\\''port 3000 cleared'\\''')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Stop-Process -Id 17664 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output '\\''port 3000 cleared'\\''')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Path -and $_.Path -match '\\''node'\\'' } | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''next|mo3ntit'\\'' -or $_.Id -eq 25204 } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table LocalPort, State, OwningProcess; Write-Output '\\''done'\\''')

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 18352 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table LocalPort, State, OwningProcess; Write-Output 'check-done'")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table LocalPort, State, OwningProcess; Write-Output '\\''done'\\''')
